creator: ports@michael-fausten.de
text:
@Sunpoet

Not that I would be aware of. Due to the rubygems.org API, these ports depend on hike:

[
    "stylish",
    "soundwave",
    "brief",
    "optimism",
    "bpm",
    "microwave",
    "sportweb",
    "opal",
    "brochure",
    "skeletor",
    "tipsy",
    "staticpress",
    "capit",
    "opal-cj",
    "flowckerc",
    "sprockets",
    "pakada-render",
    "opal-wedge"
]

Only "flowckerc" needs hike ~> 2.1.3. But this gem hasn't made it into to ports tree yet and I also can't find any pr.
I saw hike on portscout.org outdated and thought I could write a patch, but I must admit that I didn't thought that through yesterday.
Sorry, I guess I was too fast with this patch. Sorry for the circumstances.

Best regards,
Michael
